emails.body: This conflicts with Brenda's staff meeting. Do you want to send Stacey in your place? Let me know Y Forwarded by Yvette G Connevey/Corp/Enron on 02/01/2000 03:59 PM Heather Choate@ECT 02/01/2000 03:29 PM
